model: deepseek-v4-pro sharded review with deepseek-v4-flash synthesis and final delta

non_blocking_findings.summary: Initial review found LFG-P3.3 pending and Acceptance Tracking in_progress while the phase header already said pass. The plan was updated so LFG-P3.3, LFG-P3.4, DeepSeek Review Record, and Acceptance Tracking are consistent.

scope.diff_summary: LFG-P3.3 live-route closeout exposed that the state-boundary scanner still allowed fixture file-state only in the original server test. The scanner now also allows the extracted agent-key server shard while continuing to reject unapproved tests and all tools that try to use fixture file-state. A focused state-boundary test suite covers allowed shards, unapproved tests, tool rejection, and SQLite-backed callers.

notes: DeepSeek confirmed the state-boundary patch is narrow, keeps runtime/tool callers on SQLite-backed state, and has tests for the intended allowlist plus rejection paths. The first synthesis failed only because plan state still had LFG-P3.3 pending and Acceptance Tracking in_progress; the final delta review returned PASS after those plan rows were corrected.
